milestones.title: Prototype statique premium orienté mission du jour
milestones.vision: Transformer Outil Prepa en prototype statique premium et vendable, centré sur la mission du jour, la valeur perçue, la confiance Stripe, et une expérience intime de carnet de prépa vivant.
success_criteria: User can open index.html and immediately see what to work on today.
User can navigate the static routine/conversion tunnel without dead primary CTAs.
Checkout clearly communicates investment value, good deal, and Stripe trust.
Static prototype remains honest about not having backend/auth/real dynamic personalization yet.
Desktop and mobile verification passes for the core pages.

key_risks.risk: Le dashboard reste trop analytique et enterre la mission du jour.
key_risks.whyItMatters: Cela casserait la promesse de simplification et ferait ressentir l’outil comme un tableau de stats inutile.

key_risks.risk: Le craft visuel dérive vers de l’IA-slop ou des animations gadget.
key_risks.whyItMatters: La conversion à bas prix repose sur l’intimité, la spécificité et le sentiment d’un environnement de travail vivant.

key_risks.risk: La page checkout promet plus de personnalisation réelle que le prototype statique ne fournit.
key_risks.whyItMatters: Une promesse non tenue détruit la confiance, surtout autour du paiement.

key_risks.risk: Les micro-interactions au hover cachent des contenus importants sur mobile.
key_risks.whyItMatters: Une partie des utilisateurs découvrira ou paiera depuis mobile; la page doit rester compréhensible sans souris.

proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: index.html met en premier une mission du jour actionnable, avec les stats reléguées en justification.
les pages clés utilisent des détails cohérents avec le carnet de prépa vivant et des interactions qui renforcent le sens.
checkout.html vend la valeur et la confiance sans prétendre à un backend/auth/calendrier réel.
le tunnel complet est vérifié en desktop/mobile, avec CTA et contenus essentiels accessibles.

milestones.verification_contract: Run static file/link inspection and node --check scripts/checkout.js.
milestones.verification_integration: Use a local static server and browser tools to navigate index.html, mission.html, ats.html, checkout.html, and merci.html; verify primary CTAs and Stripe Payment Link DOM state.
milestones.verification_operational: No daemon lifecycle beyond local static server; verify no blocking console/network errors in the static flow.
milestones.verification_uat: Human/design judgment required for craft feel, IA-slop avoidance, value perception, and whether mission du jour feels central.
definition_of_done: index.html met la mission du jour au centre de l’expérience.
La mission du jour contient 2-3 actions concrètes, une durée, et une justification simple.
Les stats globales ne dominent plus l’écran principal.
mission.html donne une vraie sensation d’exécution focus, même statique.
ats.html sert de preuve de priorité, pas de tableau analytique principal.
checkout.html vend l’abonnement comme un investissement sur soi et une bonne affaire.
La confiance est explicite : Stripe, aucune donnée bancaire stockée, abonnement clair.
Le tunnel complet est navigable sans impasse.
Les interactions visuelles restent utiles et ne dépendent pas uniquement du hover.
Le Payment Link Stripe reste câblé, sans clé API exposée.
milestones.requirement_coverage: Covers R001-R010 in M001. Defers R011-R016 to later milestones. Keeps R017-R020 explicitly out of scope for M001.

slices.title: Dashboard mission du jour
slices.demo: L’utilisateur ouvre index.html et voit immédiatement une mission du jour claire, courte, contextualisée et actionnable; les stats servent seulement d’explication.
slices.goal: Recentrer le dashboard sur la mission du jour comme surface de décision immédiate.
slices.success_criteria:
- The first meaningful dashboard area is the daily mission, not global analytics.
- Mission includes 2-3 concrete actions, duration, and reason.
- Statistics are visually secondary and explain the mission.
- Primary mission CTA points to mission.html.
- Copy emphasizes simplification and action today.
slices.proof_level: Behavioral browser verification plus static link inspection.
slices.integration_closure: index.html links forward to mission.html and optionally ats.html/checkout.html through visible, meaningful CTAs.
slices.observability_impact: Browser-visible state is enough: mission card, CTA targets, and explanatory priority signals are inspectable without backend logs.

slices.title: Tunnel routine statique
slices.demo: L’utilisateur peut passer de la mission du jour à une page mission crédible, puis revenir vers les priorités ou l’abonnement sans rupture.
slices.goal: Make the static routine flow feel coherent from dashboard to execution and post-payment continuity.
slices.success_criteria:
- mission.html feels like focused execution of the daily mission.
- merci.html feels like the start of a routine, not just a receipt.
- ats.html is reachable as proof/context without becoming the main dashboard.
- Primary CTAs have real destinations.
- Page copy is consistent across the tunnel.
slices.proof_level: Behavioral browser navigation across the static tunnel.
slices.integration_closure: index.html, mission.html, ats.html, checkout.html, and merci.html expose a coherent navigation path with no orphan primary action.
slices.observability_impact: Static page flow can be verified through browser navigation and link assertions.

slices.title: Checkout investissement sur soi
slices.demo: checkout.html sells the 10 €/month subscription as an investment in oneself, a good deal, and a safe Stripe payment, without pretending backend features exist.
slices.goal: Refine the subscription page around value, trust, and honest static scope.
slices.success_criteria:
- 10 €/month is framed as investment on self and good deal.
- Stripe trust and no banking-data storage are visible.
- Payment terms are clear and non-anxious.
- No copy claims real auth/calendar/personalization.
- Payment Link remains configured and no secret key appears.
slices.proof_level: Static + command verification for JS, behavioral browser check for CTA state.
slices.integration_closure: checkout.html keeps scripts/checkout.js compatibility and the configured Stripe Payment Link while linking back to product proof/routine pages.
slices.observability_impact: Checkout readiness can be observed through DOM state, CTA href, and visible trust copy.

slices.title: Craft feel et micro-interactions
slices.demo: The key pages feel crafted and memorable through folders, cards, annotations, pressed CTA states, and touch-safe motion that reinforces the study environment.
slices.goal: Add or refine craft details and micro-interactions without sacrificing clarity or accessibility.
slices.success_criteria:
- Interactions feel physical and meaningful rather than decorative.
- Hover effects have mobile/touch-safe fallback states.
- Visual language stays in carnet/stabilo/fiches/dossiers theme.
- Copy avoids generic SaaS/IA-slop phrasing.
- No critical information is hidden behind hover only.
slices.integration_closure: Shared visual motifs and interactions are consistent across dashboard, mission, checkout, and confirmation surfaces.
slices.observability_impact: Visual verification via screenshots/browser review; no runtime logging needed.

slices.title: Vérification responsive et tunnel complet
slices.demo: The full static tunnel is verified desktop/mobile with functioning CTAs, Stripe Payment Link intact, no blocking console errors, and screenshots or assertions proving the final behavior.
slices.goal: Verify and tighten the integrated static experience end to end.
slices.success_criteria:
- node --check scripts/checkout.js passes.
- Core pages load locally.
- Desktop and mobile layouts are checked.
- Primary CTA links are valid.
- Checkout button href/state uses the configured Stripe Payment Link.
- No blocking console/network failures affect the tunnel.
slices.integration_closure: Final assembly proof covers index → mission/ats → checkout → Stripe URL state → merci and validates no dead primary paths remain.
slices.observability_impact: Browser console/network logs and assertion outputs provide evidence for the final summary.
